name: td613-tcp
description: The Cadence Playground — custody-aware cadence routing demo

scripts.test: node tests/chamber-smoke.test.mjs && npm run test:stylometry && node tests/td613-aperture.test.mjs && node tests/formulas.test.mjs && node tests/harbor.test.mjs && npm run test:safe-harbor
scripts.test:stylometry: node tests/stylometry.test.mjs && node tests/escape-vector.test.mjs && node tests/ingestion-friction.test.mjs && node tests/escape-controller.test.mjs && node tests/persona-memory.test.mjs && node tests/adversarial-bench.test.mjs && node tests/iteration-ledger.test.mjs && node tests/claim-ladder.test.mjs && node tests/report-export.test.mjs && npm run test:fixtures && node tests/benchmark.test.mjs && node tests/browser-parity.test.mjs && node tests/runtime-retention.test.mjs && node tests/retrieval-lane.test.mjs && node tests/swap-cadence-matrix.test.mjs && node tests/deck-randomizer.test.mjs && node tests/deck-browser.test.mjs && node tests/persona-gallery.test.mjs && node tests/au-forged-ontology.test.mjs
scripts.test:fixtures: node tests/fixtures-calibration.test.mjs && node tests/fixture-runner.test.mjs && node tests/stylometry-regression.test.mjs
scripts.test:safe-harbor: node tests/safe-harbor-shi.test.mjs && node tests/safe-harbor-batch-seal.test.mjs && node tests/station-pages.test.mjs && node tests/operator-receipt.test.mjs
scripts.test:diagnostics: node scripts/run-diagnostics-battery.mjs && node tests/diagnostics.test.mjs && node tests/diagnostics-runner.test.mjs
scripts.sync:generated: npm run sync:browser-engine && npm run sync:browser-diagnostics && npm run sync:defaults-json && npm run sync:personas-json && npm run sync:retrieval-fixtures
